the claims, and a 
subset of procedures in the Part B carrier data file. 

These other procedure claim lines are defined as those with a line BETOS code (BETOS_CD) where the 
first two digits are “P1,” “P2,” “P3,” “P4,” “P5,” “P6,” “P7,” or “P8.” 

The total Medicare payments are calculated as the sum of LINE_NCH_PMT_AMT where the 
LINE_PRCSG_IND_CD was “A,” “R,” or “S” — for all relevant lines. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: OPROC_MDCR_PMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CCW (derived)
